examples: The effects of variety and concentration of alkaline and temperature on lithium anode in electrolyse inhibitors is analyzed.
The effect of cathode, electrolyse and temperature on the performance of the battery has been investigated in terms of the shortcircuit discharge.
The basic theory and process for machining marks (code) on the outer wall of pipe with electrolyse-jet are introduced. A reasonable process rule is thus given experimentally.
You then take electricity from some renewable source (geothermal, solar, wind, whatever) and use that to electrolyse water.
The basic idea, as is done here, of using sunlight through solar PV to electrolyse water, store the hydrogen then, when the power is required, reverse the process.
